title: Aircraft Systems
description: Explain the aircraft configuration and source-backed system facts.

title: Configuration Management
description: Configure the aircraft within approved airspeed, flap, and landing gear limits.

title: Fuel Management
description: Plan, monitor, and command fuel using aircraft-specific usable fuel and POH limitations.

title: Emergency Management
description: Recognise abnormal conditions and apply source-backed emergency procedures.

title: Electrical Management
description: Diagnose electrical power supply malfunctions and preserve power for essential aircraft configuration and landing needs.

title: Decision Making
description: Make operational decisions that preserve aircraft limits and safety margins.

title: Aircraft Command
description: Integrate aircraft knowledge, procedure, and judgement under operational pressure.
